geo.home_lead: LovelyGirls Prague is an in-person verified companion agency with 13 active companions across 4 private apartments in Prague 2, Prague 8, Prague 1, and Prague 3, open daily 10:00–22:30.
geo.divky_lead: LovelyGirls Prague currently lists 13 verified companions aged 19–32, filterable by location, language, height, and same-day availability.
geo.cenik_lead: At LovelyGirls Prague, companion programs start at 2,500 CZK for 30 minutes, 2,500 CZK for 60 minutes, and 4,500 CZK for 2 hours; all prices include the apartment fee.
geo.faq_lead: Hiring an adult companion is legal in the Czech Republic for clients aged 18+; LovelyGirls Prague verifies every companion in person and operates from registered apartments in Prague.
geo.slevy_lead: LovelyGirls Prague offers a 10–15 % loyalty discount after 3, 5, and 10 visits, a morning discount from 10:00–13:00 on weekdays, and a birthday discount of 20 %.
geo.rozvrh_lead: LovelyGirls Prague schedule: see which companions are available today and this week, filterable by apartment location.

onas.lead: Premium escort agency in central Prague. Discretion, verified profiles and private apartments.
onas.s1_text: LovelyGirls Prague is a premium escort agency with private apartments in the city centre. We only work with verified companions — no fake photos, no surprises.
onas.s2_text: We stand on discretion and transparency. No hidden fees, no client databases, no receipts. What happens in the apartment stays in the apartment.
onas.s3_text: Private apartments in central Prague. Open daily 10:00–22:30. We reply within 5 minutes on WhatsApp or Telegram. No registration required.

kontakt.lead: We reply within 5 minutes. No registration, complete discretion.

podminky.lead: Terms of use for the LovelyGirls Prague website.
podminky.s1_text: This website is operated solely for advertising purposes of service providers. The website operator does not mediate sexual services and bears no responsibility for the services of the advertised individuals.
podminky.s2_text: This website is intended exclusively for persons over 18 years of age. By entering the website you confirm that you have reached the age of 18 and are of legal age under the laws of your country.
podminky.s3_text: A condition for advertising on this website is the rental of a room. The website operator does not provide or mediate sexual services.

soukromi.lead: How we handle your personal data.
soukromi.s1_text: When visiting the website we collect anonymized analytics data (visit count, viewed pages). We only collect personal data if you contact us directly.
soukromi.s2_text: The website uses necessary cookies for proper functionality (age gate consent). We use analytics cookies in anonymized form.
soukromi.s3_text: You have the right to request deletion of your personal data. Contact us via WhatsApp or Telegram.
